checks.description: Outputs must be mutually exclusive for any input values.
checks.pass_condition: At any time exactly one of A_greater, A_equal, A_less is high (1) and the other two are low (0).
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever any input pattern, including boundary values, is applied to A and B.

checks.description: For any stable input combination of A and B, the outputs must correctly encode the comparison result.
checks.pass_condition: If A > B then A_greater=1 and A_equal=0 and A_less=0; if A == B then A_equal=1 and A_greater=0 and A_less=0; if A < B then A_less=1 and A_greater=0 and A_equal=0.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic stimulus applies a legal input pattern to A and B.
